summary: The diff implements all 9 requirements comprehensively. The backend actor stores services, staff, business hours, contact info, and appointments with query functions. The frontend includes a hero section, services grid, team section, gallery, contact/hours section with appointment form, sticky navigation with hamburger menu, dark gold theme, and all images loaded from /assets/generated/. No significant missing requirements were found. A few unrequested features were added.

hallucinated_features.description: Gallery lightbox feature: clicking a gallery image opens a fullscreen lightbox overlay with a close button.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked for a responsive masonry or grid layout for the gallery. A lightbox/modal viewer was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Stats row in hero section displaying '10+ Years Experience', '5K+ Happy Clients', '4.9 Average Rating'.
hallucinated_features.reason: The hero section requirements only specified the barbershop name, tagline, and a 'Book Now' CTA button. Static stats content was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module referencing an old puzzle/game leaderboard schema for data migration.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request is a new barbershop website with no mention of migrating from a previous puzzle game application.

hallucinated_features.description: A 'Book Now' button added to the desktop navigation bar in addition to the section nav links.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-7 only specified smooth-scroll links to sections and a hamburger menu. An additional CTA button in the nav was not explicitly requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Footer section with brand logo, navigation links, address, and external attribution.
hallucinated_features.reason: No footer was specified in any of the requirements.
